name: Crab and Avocado Cocktail
recipeIngredient: 2 Each Jalapeno Chiles, Seeds Removed and Finely Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and finely chop the jalapeno chiles.
2. Mix all ingredients except lettuce and lime wedges in a large bowl.
3. Place 1/4 cup of lettuce on the bottom of each of 6 serving dishes.
4. Divide the crabmeat mixture among the dishes.
5. Garnish with lime wedges.
